other_findings.finding: Dermal fibroblast 3 was predominantly located in the reticular dermis (see Supplementary Fig. 5b).
F3 is functionally annotated with extracellular matrix organization.

evidence_quotes.quote: Representative marker genes for F3 included C7, MFAP4, and FMO2 (see Supplementary Table 2).
